(0, 0) ->  1
(1, 0) ->  2 ∂1
(2, 0) -> 11 ∂9
(3, 0) -> 28

66 37 36 35 34 33 32 31 56
67 38 17 16 15 14 13 30 55
68 39 18  5  4  3 12 29 54
69 40 19  6  1  2 11 28 53
70 41 20  7  8  9 10 27 52
71 42 21 22 23 24 25 26 51
72 43 44 45 46 47 48 49 50
73 74 75 76 77 78 79 80 81


f(1) = 8 = 3 ** 2 - 1
f(2) = 23 = 5 ** 2 - 2
f(3) = 46 = 7** 2 - 3
